title: Remove publish details UI element

requirements.text: Remove the 'publish detail' UI element (the caffeine.ai attribution or any deployment/publish metadata display) from the app's layout or footer so it is no longer visible to users.
acceptanceCriteria: No publish detail, deployment info, or caffeine.ai attribution text is visible anywhere in the app UI.
The rest of the layout (masthead, navigation, footer copyright, content) remains intact and unaffected.
The change is applied globally across all pages.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not alter any content, navigation links, or styling beyond removing the publish detail element.
nonGoals: Redesigning the footer or any other layout section.
Removing the copyright notice or any other footer text beyond the publish detail.
